info.name: Food Delivery Order Management - Complete E2E
info.description: Complete end-to-end Postman collection for the Spring Boot Food Delivery Order Management project. Run folders in order. Assumes demo users exist: admin/admin123, owner/owner123, owner2/owner2123, customer/customer123, customer2/customer2123, partner/partner123, partner2/partner2123. If customer2 is not seeded, skip customer2-specific negative cases or seed it first.

request.description: Checks the app is running without auth.

item.name: Protected restaurants API without auth returns 401

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Customer is blocked from admin-only customer listing.

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Stores customer2Id. Requires customer2/customer2123 and linked Customer profile.

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: List cities and capture Delhi/active city

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
let city = json.find(c => c.name === "Delhi" && c.status === "ACTIVE") || json.find(c => c.status === "ACTIVE") || json[0];

item.name: List delivery partners and capture IDs

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
let p = json.find(x => x.username === pm.environment.get("partnerUsername")) || json.find(x => x.name === "Ravi Partner");
let p2 = json.find(x => x.username === pm.environment.get("partner2Username")) || json.find(x => x.name === "Second Partner");

item.name: Reset partner to active test city

request.description: Ensures partner is available in test city.

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: Reset partner2 to active test city

request.description: Ensures partner2 is available in test city.

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200, 201]", function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Owner creates menu item for their own restaurant.

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200, 201]", function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Creates second restaurant owned by owner2.

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200, 201]", function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Owner2 creates menu item for owner2 restaurant.

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200, 201]", function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: 02 - Complete happy path: order to review

request.description: Customer places paid order. Stock, order, and payment are handled transactionally.

pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: partner2 cannot act as partner profile.

pm.test("history has at least five entries", function(){ pm.expect(json.length).to.be.at.least(5); });
pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: Customer cannot order using another customerId
Owner cannot create menu item for owner2 restaurant

request.description: Restaurant owner cannot manage another owner restaurant.

item.name: Admin can create menu item for owner2 restaurant

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200, 201]", function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: Wrong owner cannot accept owner2 order
Correct owner2 can accept owner2 order

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: Different customer cannot view customer order

request.description: Creates Mumbai if it does not already exist. A 400 is okay if duplicate.

exec: pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200, 201, 400]", function () { pm.expect([200, 201, 400]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("HTTP status is one of [200]", function () { pm.expect([200]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
